message:
feat(planner): morsel-parallel SELECT eligibility detection + threshold heuristic (bd-b434d)

First slice of PERF-W6-3: add MorselEligibility to QueryPlan that
detects OLAP-shape queries eligible for morsel-parallel execution.

Eligibility criteria:
- Single-table full-table scan (no index scan, no join)
- Estimated rows >= 4096
- No LIMIT clause (would short-circuit morsel splitting)
- Not a compound (UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT) query

Morsel sizing: rows_per_morsel = max(1024, est_rows / num_workers),
capped at 64 morsels. The VDBE executor can use this to split the
driving scan into PageMorsel ranges processed in parallel under
separate snapshot-consistent cursors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
